name: Developer Zen
description: Calm focus affirmations for builders, coders, and problem-solvers.

affirmations.text: I solve one problem at a time with patience and clarity.
My code and my mindset improve with every iteration I ship.
I stay curious, refactor fearlessly, and learn from every bug.
I communicate kindly in reviews and celebrate small wins.
I step away when I need rest and return with fresh perspective.
I trust my process; complex systems become clear one layer at a time.
I am resilient when builds fail—each fix makes me stronger.
I craft quality with intention, without chasing impossible perfection.
